nasb.text: But he refused and said, “I will not eat.” However, his servants together with the woman urged him, and he listened to them. So he arose from the ground and sat on the bed.

esv.text: He refused and said, “I will not eat.” But his servants, together with the woman, urged him, and he listened to their words. So he arose from the earth and sat on the bed.

cnv.text: 掃羅不肯，說：“我不吃。”可是他的臣僕和那女人再三勸他，他才聽從了他們的話，從地上起來，坐在床上。

ccb.text: 扫罗不肯，说：“我不吃。”他的随从和妇人再三劝告，他才同意了，从地上起来坐到床上。
